featureDetection.rationale: Checks for native support of Uint8Array.prototype.toBase64 and toggles status messages and warning labels.

gracefulFallback.rationale: Includes a robust native-matching fallback polyfill so encode/decode remains fully operational on legacy clients.

genuineInteraction.rationale: Enables users to input custom texts, copy encoded hex or base64 strings, and round-trip decode pasted byte sequences.

builderMultipleDemos.rationale: Forms part of a rich, 4-part educational library on the TC39 proposal.

designSystemContrast.rationale: Follows theme guidelines accurately with very clean layout structures.

references.rationale: The page is missing the required reference link to chromestatus.com/feature/6281131254874112.

openQuestions.title: Add ChromeStatus reference link
openQuestions.detail: The concept page is missing the required chromestatus.com/feature/6281131254874112 reference link.
